message.content:
@startuml
entity plugin_translation as "plugin_translation\n((Translations))" {
    *label : string
    *description : longText
    *manufacturerLink : string
    *supportLink : string
    *changelog : json
    *customFields : customFields
    *createdAt : createdAt
    *updatedAt : updatedAt
    *pluginId : foreignKey
    *languageId : foreignKey
}

entity plugin as "plugin\n(Plugin)" {
    *id : id
    *baseClass : string
    *name : string
    *composerName : string
    *autoload : json
    *active : bool
    *managedByComposer : bool
    *path : string
    *author : string
    *copyright : string
    *license : string
    *version : string
    *upgradeVersion : string
    *installedAt : date
    *upgradedAt : date
    *iconRaw : blob
    *icon : string
    *label : translated
    *description : translated
    *manufacturerLink : translated
    *supportLink : translated
    *changelog : translated
    *customFields : translated
    *createdAt : createdAt
    *updatedAt : updatedAt
    *translated : json
}

entity language as "language" {
}

entity payment_method as "payment_method" {
}

plugin_translation --> plugin
plugin_translation --> language
plugin --> payment_method
@enduml
